title: Garlicky Crumbly Indian Cheese Casserole
description: A delightful, garlicky casserole featuring cheddar cheese and a blend of Indian spices, perfect for a quick and satisfying meal. This dish combines the richness of cheese with the warmth of Indian flavors.

ingredients.name: cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: sharp or extra sharp works well

instructions: In a large skillet, heat the ghee or oil over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until it's translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for another minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the garam masala, cumin powder, coriander powder, and crushed red pepper (if using). Cook for 1 minute.
Add the shredded cheese to the skillet and stir until it starts to melt and combine with the spice mixture.
Transfer the cheese mixture to a baking dish.
Sprinkle the crushed crackers or breadcrumbs evenly over the top of the cheese mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
